examples: Over 600 workers were made compulsorily redundant.
For this reason we return and we will not compulsorily limit foreign players.
The number of bank accounts that are closed compulsorily has been increasing rapidly.

In September, some newspapers had reported that about 8, 000 soldiers would be made compulsorily redundant after Christmas.
